game_design_media_courses.title: Game Theory and Mechanics
game_design_media_courses.description: Study of game design theory, mechanics, and player psychology including game balance, progression systems, and player motivation. Students learn to design engaging gameplay experiences while understanding the psychological and social aspects of gaming.
learning_objectives: Understand fundamental game design theory and principles
Analyze game mechanics and their impact on player experience
Design balanced and engaging gameplay systems
Apply player psychology to game design decisions
Evaluate games critically from a design perspective

game_design_media_courses.title: Digital Art Fundamentals
game_design_media_courses.description: Introduction to digital art creation for games and media including 2D graphics, color theory, composition, and digital art tools. Students develop foundational artistic skills essential for game and media production.
learning_objectives: Master digital art tools and software
Apply fundamental art principles to digital media
Create 2D artwork for games and interactive media
Understand color theory and visual composition
Develop artistic workflow and production skills

game_design_media_courses.title: 2D Game Development
game_design_media_courses.description: Hands-on development of 2D games using game engines and programming tools. Students learn complete game development pipeline from concept to playable prototype while understanding 2D-specific design and technical considerations.
learning_objectives: Develop complete 2D games from concept to completion
Use game engines and development tools effectively
Implement 2D game mechanics and systems
Create game assets and integrate them into projects
Apply iterative development and testing processes

game_design_media_courses.title: 3D Modeling and Animation
game_design_media_courses.description: Introduction to 3D modeling, texturing, and animation techniques for games and media. Students learn industry-standard 3D software while creating assets suitable for real-time rendering and interactive applications.
learning_objectives: Create 3D models using industry-standard software
Apply texturing and material creation techniques
Implement character and object animation
Understand 3D pipeline and asset optimization
Develop skills in lighting and rendering for games

game_design_media_courses.title: Interactive Storytelling
game_design_media_courses.description: Exploration of narrative techniques specific to interactive media including branching narratives, player agency, and environmental storytelling. Students learn to create compelling stories that adapt to player choices and interactions.
learning_objectives: Understand principles of interactive narrative design
Create branching storylines and dialogue systems
Apply environmental storytelling techniques
Balance player agency with narrative coherence
Evaluate narrative effectiveness in interactive media

game_design_media_courses.title: Level Design
game_design_media_courses.description: Principles and practices of level design for games including spatial design, player flow, and gameplay pacing. Students learn to create engaging and functional game environments that support gameplay objectives.
learning_objectives: Apply level design principles and best practices
Create game levels that support gameplay objectives
Understand player flow and spatial navigation
Design for different game genres and platforms
Use level editing tools and design software
covered_materials: Spatial design and architecture for games

game_design_media_courses.title: Character Design and Development
game_design_media_courses.description: Creation of compelling game characters including visual design, personality development, and technical implementation. Students learn character creation pipeline from concept art to in-game implementation.
learning_objectives: Design visually appealing and functional game characters
Develop character personalities and backstories
Understand character animation and rigging requirements
Create character concept art and documentation
Implement characters in game development pipelines

game_design_media_courses.title: Game Audio and Sound Design
game_design_media_courses.description: Creation and implementation of audio for games including music, sound effects, and voice acting. Students learn audio production techniques while understanding the role of sound in creating immersive game experiences.
learning_objectives: Create effective game audio and sound effects
Understand interactive audio implementation
Apply music composition and arrangement for games
Use audio production tools and software
Design audio that enhances gameplay and narrative
covered_materials: Audio fundamentals and digital audio workstations
Music composition and arrangement for games
Audio mixing and mastering for games

game_design_media_courses.title: 3D Game Development
game_design_media_courses.description: Advanced 3D game development including 3D graphics programming, physics simulation, and complex game systems. Students create sophisticated 3D games while learning advanced technical and design concepts.
learning_objectives: Develop complete 3D games using modern engines
Implement 3D graphics and rendering techniques
Create complex 3D gameplay mechanics
Optimize 3D games for performance
Apply advanced game development patterns

game_design_media_courses.title: Mobile Game Development
game_design_media_courses.description: Development of games for mobile platforms including iOS and Android. Students learn mobile-specific design considerations, touch interfaces, and platform requirements while creating games optimized for mobile devices.
learning_objectives: Develop games optimized for mobile platforms
Design effective touch-based user interfaces
Understand mobile platform requirements and limitations
Implement mobile-specific features and APIs

game_design_media_courses.title: Virtual Reality and Augmented Reality
game_design_media_courses.description: Development of VR and AR experiences including immersive design principles, interaction techniques, and technical implementation. Students create innovative experiences using emerging VR/AR technologies.
learning_objectives: Develop VR and AR applications and experiences
Apply immersive design principles and best practices
Implement VR/AR interaction techniques
Understand hardware limitations and optimization

educational_technology_courses.title: Learning Theory and Development
educational_technology_courses.description: Comprehensive study of learning theories and human development principles that inform educational technology design. Students explore cognitive, behavioral, and constructivist approaches while understanding how technology can support different learning processes.

Analyze cognitive development and learning processes

educational_technology_courses.description: Design and implementation of digital learning environments including virtual classrooms, online learning platforms, and blended learning systems. Students learn to create effective digital spaces that support teaching and learning.

Develop digital design portfolio pieces
covered_materials: Color theory and digital color systems
Web design principles and responsive design

economics_and_supporting_courses.title: Media Studies
economics_and_supporting_courses.description: Critical analysis of media systems, content, and effects including traditional and digital media. Students examine media's role in society while developing media literacy and critical thinking skills.
learning_objectives: Analyze media systems and industry structures
Understand media effects on individuals and society
Develop critical media literacy skills
Examine representation and diversity in media
Evaluate media ethics and social responsibility
covered_materials: Future of media and emerging technologies
